economic_notes: Band Revenue segment includes campsite operations, property taxation, and resource management. BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP investment. Specific claim settlement distribution to members under 18 held in internally restricted trust fund.
notes: Audit is qualified due to absence of budget comparison information (not a scope limitation on financial position). Large one-time specific claim settlement of $21,428,571 dominates 2020 results. Two subsidiaries consolidated: Chowethel Axwest Managing Partner Ltd. and Chowethel Qaqelstexw LLP. $2,925,000 held in internally restricted trust for minor members' share of specific claim distribution. CMHC replacement reserve underfunded by $209,869. Nation is economically dependent on government transfer funding. Social Development and Health reported as combined segment; expenses_social set to 0 and expenses_health contains the combined figure. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($3,999,732) minus other government transfers ($22,828,735) = $4,816,243.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
